name: talk-html-plugin
description: Talk to humans in HTML — role-aware. /talk-html routes the page to one of 8 audience-specific sub-commands (/talk-ux, /talk-ceo, /talk-data, /talk-reviewer, /talk-cto, /talk-qa, /talk-docs, /talk-legal). Each role hardcodes the audience, the proof modality they must see, the build tools, the programmatic evaluation tools, and the deterministic CI gate from the proof-build-eval matrix. Pages are grounded in real content, embed real recordings for anything non-static, render in zh-CN, preview locally, and publish to a GitHub gist by default.
